text      : st_intersects(g, to_geometry('POLYGON((20 20, 20 30, 30 30, 30 20, 20 20))'))
expr      : st_intersects<Geometry, Geometry>(g, CAST<String>("POLYGON((20 20, 20 30, 30 30, 30 20, 20 20))" AS Geometry))
spatial   : Some({0: SpatialStatistics { min_x: 0.0, min_y: 0.0, max_x: 10.0, max_y: 10.0, srid: 0, has_null: false, has_empty_rect: false, is_valid: true }})
keep      : false

keep      : true
